title: You've Got a Friend
why_this_song: You've Got a Friend by Carole King (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You've got a friend"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "You've got a friend"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "And you know wherever I am"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "You just call out my name"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "I'll come running"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Grows dark and full of clouds
And that old north wind begins to blow
You just call out my name
And you know wherever I am

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "you've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "friend" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "friend" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And that old north wind begins to blow
And you know wherever I am

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And you need some loving care
All you have to do is call

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "You've Got a Friend" was released in 1971. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "You've Got a Friend" foi lançada em 1971. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "You've Got a Friend" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "You've Got a Friend" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
